title: Football Qatar 2022
description: Play these stunning cards in real-life games against your friends, or use them for our ever-growing online game. And watch out for the strongest cards of all: the TOP MASTERS, a must-have for any Adrenalyn XL™ fan, and the super-rare INVINCIBLE, the collection’s most-wanted card. And as ever, where there’s football, there’s also Panini, and we’re ready to kick off with FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022™ Adrenalyn XL™, the official card collection that gets bigger and better with every edition!
